data.title: EigenLayer (EIGEN) price soars 26% to $1.93, RSI at 70.38 suggests overbought conditions, possible consolidation looming.
data.description: The price of EIGEN has surged by 25.91% to reach $1.93, while the Relative Strength Index (RSI) has reached 70.38, indicating significant bullish momentum. However, this could suggest an upcoming period of short-term consolidation for traders of EigenLayer.
Goldman Sachs Appoints Ben Snider as New Chief US Equity Strategist

data.title: Zazzle acquires Hobnob to offer complete event planning solution. Hobnob has helped millions organize events.
data.description: Menlo Park, California - Zazzle, a leading global platform for personalized design and products, has announced the acquisition of Hobnob, a popular mobile-first event planning app. This move is aimed at enhancing the event planning experience for users, particularly during festive seasons such as Halloween, Friendsgiving, winter weddings, and holiday gatherings. Hobnob, which has assisted millions in organizing various real-life events, allows hosts to effortlessly send invitations and manage RSVPs through its user-friendly interface. The partnership aims to make special moments unforgettable, building on Hobnob's success in streamlining event planning.

data.title: ETHFI climbs 10.38% to $1.64; RSI signals overbought at 70.05. Caution advised as it nears $1.68 resistance. Read more.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Ether.Fi (ETHFI) has surged to $1.64, supported by significant trading volume. However, caution is advised as the Relative Strength Index (RSI) sits at 70.05, indicating potential overbought conditions. The price is nearing a crucial resistance level at $1.68, suggesting a potential barrier to further upward movement.

data.title: Michael Saylor of MSTR calls Bitcoin 'digital capital,' predicts finance rebuild. Bitcoin treasury cos are starting, signaling shift in finance.
data.description: Michael Saylor, executive chairman of Strategy (NASDAQ: MSTR), has declared the commencement of "year one" for Bitcoin treasury companies, marking a new era in finance centered around "digital capital" and "digital intelligence." During the Bitcoin Treasuries Unconference, Saylor highlighted the significance of these companies in repurposing capital, likening it to how miners repurpose energy. He emphasized two key shifts: institutions are gradually showing interest in crypto after years of hesitancy, with the policy leaning towards Bitcoin, although Western banks are still adjusting their stance. This marks a significant transformation in the financial sector.

data.title: AIHA in FALLS CHURCH, Va. releases new streamlined second edition of Healthier Workplaces and Schools eBook to ensure health safety.
data.description: In a recent announcement from Falls Church, Virginia, AIHA, a prominent association dedicated to advancing occupational and environmental health and safety, launched a revised edition of its renowned Healthier Workplaces and Schools eBook for 2024. With an aim to support workplaces and educational institutions as they navigate the flu and cold season, this enhanced second edition offers streamlined and updated health protocols. AIHA's focus on safeguarding the well-being of individuals in the workplace and community underscores its commitment to maintaining occupational health standards. This initiative comes as employers and facilities are increasingly prioritizing measures to mitigate airborne infection risks.

data.title: Jack in the Box introduces Monster Munchie Meal and oversized Halloween favorites to satisfy scary cravings. #Halloween #MonsterTaco
data.description: In San Diego, Jack in the Box (NASDAQ: JACK) is ramping up Halloween with a bigger and bolder approach. The celebrated Monster Taco is making a comeback for the fifth year, now accompanied by a fresh selection of enlarged favorites and seasonal specials to cater to even the most monstrous appetites. Headlining the offerings is the debut of the Monster Munchie Meal, a snack-focused combo intended for serious snacking. This colossal meal package boasts two Monster Tacos, a Monster Mozzarella Stick, and more. Don't miss out on these limited-time items!

data.title: Igloo and NFL celebrate 5th season of licensing agreement with new product lineup "For the Coolest Fans", featuring team-branded wearable coolers and drinkware.
data.description: The cooler brand Igloo has renewed its licensing agreement with the NFL for the fifth year in a row in Katy, Texas. The partnership, which began in 2021, has evolved into Igloo's most extensive NFL product line yet. This collection includes team-branded wearable coolers and stainless-steel drinkware targeted at football enthusiasts. The collaboration has seen significant growth, catering to fans deeply passionate about the sport. This marks an exciting venture for Igloo as they further cement their presence in the football market.

data.title: Freddie Mac reports 30-year fixed-rate mortgage averages 6.26% marking a decrease.
data.description: Freddie Mac, headquartered in McLean, Virginia, published the findings of its Primary Mortgage Market Survey ® (PMMS ® ) on September 18, 2025. According to the report, the average interest rate for a 30-year fixed-rate mortgage (FRM) stood at 6.26%.

data.title: Akamai CEO Dr. Tom Leighton wins Technology & Engineering Emmy Lifetime Achievement Award. CB: $AKAM.
data.description: Dr. Tom Leighton, co-founder and CEO of Akamai, has been awarded a prestigious Technology & Engineering Emmy® Lifetime Achievement Award by the National Academy of Television Arts & Sciences. The recognition was announced on September 18, 2025, in CAMBRIDGE, Mass. Akamai Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: AKAM), a leading cybersecurity company, celebrated Dr. Leighton's visionary contributions to the field.

data.title: Inventor creates PETGO kiosk for self-service dog wash/grooming. Convenient solution for pet owners.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on September 18, 2025, an inventor from Nashville, Tennessee, introduced the PETGO kiosk designed to offer self-service dog washing and grooming for pet owners. The inventor aimed to provide a convenient solution and mentioned that the design is simple and user-friendly. This innovation is intended to cater to pet owners' needs and aims to provide them with everything required for the care of their pets.

data.title: Toku and Kota integrate to enhance benefit access in stablecoin platform.
data.description: Toku and Kota have recently announced a strategic integration to enhance benefit access within their stablecoin compensation platform. This collaboration aims to streamline the process and make it easier for users to access benefits. The platform has been experiencing rapid growth, with an increasing number of users joining. This integration will provide a more efficient and user-friendly experience for the platform's users.

data.title: NVIDIA introduces Blackwell, an advanced architecture revolutionizing AI factories, boosting AI inference at scale.
data.description: NVIDIA has introduced Blackwell, a revolutionary architecture tailored for fueling AI factories. This new design aims to improve AI inference capabilities on a massive scale, offering unparalleled efficiency. The unveiling of Blackwell marks a significant advancement in the AI industry, promising enhanced performance and scalability for AI-driven processes.
